style_effects: Subtle steam wisps curl from Pidgeot's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor; glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along its seam lines, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into prismatic shards. Metallic dust particles drift in slow motion, catching the light like suspended glitter, while a cool cyan aura encircles its body in a tight, geometric halo. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
